title: Arts. 1133 to 1137 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_html:
SECTION 4--OF THE DUTIES AND POWERS OF CURATORS OF

VACANT SUCCESSIONS AND OF ABSENT HEIRS

Art. 1133.  Arts. 1133 to 1137 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
